channel.title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Celebration of life for Jesse Jackson to draw former presidents and Grammy-winning artists
item.description: Three former U.S. presidents, Grammy-winning artists, clergy and elected officials are expected to attend a Chicago celebration of life Friday for the...

item.title: Storms rip through Oklahoma as even more intense weather is possible Friday across the central US
item.description: Severe storms are sweeping across the central U.S., and forecasters warn tornadoes could turn dangerous across several states

item.title: Two men attacked San Francisco mayor's bodyguards, authorities say
item.description: Two men are under arrest after police say they attacked two officers protecting San Francisco Mayor Daniel Lurie

item.title: Judge weighs New York Times bid to block policy limiting journalists' Pentagon access
item.description: The New York Times is urging a federal judge to block a Pentagon policy that has limited access to the building for journalists from many mainstream n...

item.title: 911 calls, interviews reveal problems at ICE's largest detention camp
item.description: Serious medical and mental health emergencies have been routine at the nation’s largest U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement detention facility si...
